history.title: About the Casino
history.description1: At Megaways Casino, we bring our guests an online casino experience built around the energy of Megaways slots and fast-moving casino entertainment. Our official About Us page describes Megaways Casino as a UK online casino launched in 2026 and operated by Skill On Net, with a focus on bringing the Megaways slot experience into the wider casino environment.
items: Our live casino includes over 480 games.
history.description2: Our casino offers a large and diverse games lobby. The official homepage highlights over 8,000 games, including world-famous Megaways slots, live casino games, jackpots, and instant wins. Our About Us page also states that we work with more than 70 licensed game studios and offer over 6,000 online slots from providers such as ELK Studios, Big Time Gaming, and NetEnt.
history.description3:
We give our guests multiple ways to play, from Megaways slots and classic casino titles to live dealer tables and modern game shows. Our live casino is powered by Evolution and Pragmatic Play, with real dealers, live tables, Blackjack, Roulette, Baccarat, and more than 50 modern game shows, including Crazy Time and Sweet Bonanza CandyLand.

Our casino is designed around secure, transparent, and responsible play. Megaways Casino states that games are certified by independent testing house iTech Labs, payment security uses industry-standard encryption, and most withdrawals are processed instantly. We also provide safer gambling tools, including deposit limits, playtime reminders, cooling-off options, and self-exclusion features.
